prompt: My Cloud Run service 'payment-api' in us-central1 is returning 503 errors since this morning. Help me figure out what's going on.
assertions: Output includes a gcloud run services describe command for payment-api in us-central1
Output includes a gcloud logging read command filtered for the payment-api service
Output includes severity filtering (ERROR or severity>=ERROR) in the logging command
Agent does NOT ask for confirmation before running read-only commands like describe, list, or logging read
Output includes a gcloud run revisions list command to check revision status
Agent verifies project context (gcloud config get-value project or gcloud auth list) before running commands
Agent does NOT attempt to redeploy, update, or delete the service without asking the user first
Output uses --format flag for readable or structured output on at least one command
